aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.jd_summary: Digital Platform Specialist at AIA Indonesia. Manage day-to-day digital platform initiatives, own the digital platform technology roadmap, implement IT and design standards, lead coordination with Business/IT/design/group teams, ensure customer centricity in releases, monitor platform usability and stability. Mid-Senior level.
aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.jd_responsibilities: ["Own digital platform technology roadmap","Implement IT and Design Standard on digital platform","Lead coordination with Business IT design and group working team to ensure digital platform development is aligned with company objectives","Identify and lead solutioning discussions for potential setback within digital platform development","Update stakeholders on digital platform issues and propose solutions","Ensure customer centricity is prioritized in each functionality release","Engage in digital platform UI design and UX research with HCD","Monitor digital platforms usability and stability"]
aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.jd_requirements: ["Experience managing digital platforms","Understanding of IT standards and design guidelines","Cross-functional coordination skills","UX/UI awareness","Stakeholder management skills","Customer-centric mindset","Problem-solving and solutioning skills"]
aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.tailoring_emphasize_skills: ["Digital Platform Management — owned platform operations for fintech systems serving 14,000+ clients","Stakeholder Management — coordinated with Business, IT, Design, and Group teams at Wirecard across 69 countries","UX/UI Awareness — built user-facing products with HCD principles (Srabutan.com, CrosSyncOrder)","IT Standards & Design Guidelines — implemented compliance standards (PCI-DSS) and design systems","Cross-Functional Coordination — partnered with product, data, operations, and compliance teams","Solutioning & Problem-Solving — identified platform setbacks and proposed technical solutions","Customer-Centric Mindset — prioritized user experience in every feature release across products","Technical Roadmap Ownership — defined and executed technology roadmaps for platform evolution"]
aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.tailoring_highlight_projects: ["Wirecard Digital Platform — Owned platform technology roadmap for payment gateway serving 14,000+ corporate clients; coordinated with Business, IT, and Group teams across 69 countries to ensure platform stability and customer-centric releases","Srabutan.com — Led UI/UX design and digital platform development for AI freelance marketplace with HCD approach, ensuring customer-centric functionality","CITT Services — Managed digital platform initiatives for enterprise fintech clients, coordinating between business stakeholders and technical teams"]
aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.tailoring_custom_summary: Digital platform specialist with 10+ years managing and evolving enterprise platforms across fintech and SaaS in Southeast Asia. Proven ability to own digital platform technology roadmaps, implement IT and design standards, and lead cross-functional coordination between Business, IT, Design, and Group teams. Deep stakeholder management experience from Wirecard, where I coordinated platform initiatives across 69 countries and ensured customer-centricity in every release.
aia-indonesia-digital-platform-specialis.tailoring_key_achievements: ["Owned digital platform technology roadmap at Wirecard for payment gateway serving 14,000+ corporate clients — coordinated releases across Business, IT, Design, and Group stakeholders in 69 countries","Led cross-functional coordination ensuring customer-centric platform releases — translating business objectives into platform functionality with measurable usability improvements","Identified and resolved platform setbacks proactively at Wirecard, proposing technical solutions that maintained 99.99% uptime across global operations","Drove UX/UI improvements for Srabutan.com using human-centered design — conducting user research and implementing design standards that improved customer engagement"]

banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.jd_summary: Manager-level IT role for pre-opening of HOMM Pondak Indah hotel under Banyan Group. Responsible for IT infrastructure setup, PMS/POS systems, network, cybersecurity, and supporting day-to-day hotel IT operations.
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.jd_responsibilities: ["Lead IT setup for pre-opening hotel property","Manage PMS/POS system implementation","Oversee network infrastructure and cybersecurity","Ensure IT compliance with Banyan Group standards","Provide daily IT operational support","Coordinate with corporate IT and vendors"]
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.jd_requirements: ["4-6 years experience in IT management, preferably in hospitality","Experience with PMS (Opera etc.) and POS systems","Strong knowledge of networking, cybersecurity, and IT infrastructure","Hotel pre-opening experience is a plus","Good communication and leadership skills"]
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.jd_nice_to_have: ["Hotel pre-opening experience","Experience with luxury hospitality brands"]
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.tailoring_emphasize_skills: ["IT infrastructure setup and management", "Network infrastructure and cybersecurity", "PMS/POS system implementation (Opera, Micros)", "Vendor management and coordination", "Corporate IT compliance standards", "Team leadership and training", "System administration (Linux/Ubuntu)", "Cloud infrastructure (Google Cloud, DigitalOcean)", "PCI-DSS compliance environments", "Disaster recovery and business continuity"]
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.tailoring_highlight_projects: ["End-to-end IT infrastructure provisioning for fintech/payment gateway operations — from network architecture through production deployment, mirroring hotel pre-opening IT setup requirements", "PCI-DSS compliant IT environment management at Wirecard — implementing security standards, access controls, and audit-ready documentation across systems processing transactions for 14,000+ corporate clients", "Vendor coordination for enterprise technology stack — managing relationships with infrastructure providers, SaaS vendors, and system integrators to deliver production-grade environments"]
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.tailoring_custom_summary: IT leader with 10+ years of experience provisioning, managing, and securing enterprise IT infrastructure. Deep expertise in network architecture, cybersecurity, and systems integration — the exact skills needed to lead IT setup for HOMM Pondak Indah's pre-opening. Experienced in implementing enterprise-grade systems (PMS, POS, ERP) in regulated environments including PCI-DSS compliant payment processing infrastructure. Based in Jakarta with strong Bahasa Indonesia and English communication skills.
banyan-group-manager-it-homm-4415009294.tailoring_key_achievements: ["Provisioned and managed IT infrastructure for payment gateway systems supporting 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries", "Implemented PCI-DSS compliant network security infrastructure including firewalls, access controls, and monitoring systems", "Led vendor selection and coordination for enterprise technology stacks — managing SaaS providers, infrastructure vendors, and system integrators", "Operated Ubuntu/Linux-based production infrastructure for 10+ years — system monitoring, log analysis, performance profiling, and incident response", "Coordinated cross-functional IT projects with corporate teams and external partners"]
